case_title: MARIA RAMIREZ SILVA VS. VILMA MORALES

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-30-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-30-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---SONIA MONTENEGRO. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,752.50 FILED BY RAMIREZ SILVA, MARIA AS TO DEFENDANT MORALES, VILMA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-30-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RAMIREZ SILVA, MARIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORALES, VILMA $4,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-30-2014 - JUDGMENT.
